## Scope and complexity

- [ ] Self-contained code change (one file or one feature path)
- [ ] Touches infrastructure (CloudFormation, deploy scripts)
- [ ] Touches CI/CD (`.github/workflows/`)
- [ ] Adds a new dependency
- [ ] Adds a new external service or API integration
- [ ] Schema change (DynamoDB table or local storage format)
